LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF CATHAY BANK, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR ORDER OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOLLOWING DEFAULT IN PAYMENTS PURSUANT TO WRITTEN STIPULATION IS CONTINUED TO JULY 23, 2013 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JUNE 24, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Of Entry Of Judgment Following Default In Payments Pursuant To Written Stipulation
Off Calendar Jul-23-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CATHAY BANK, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's Motion For Order Of Entry Of Judgment Following Default In Payments Pursuant To Written Stipulation is off calendar. This matter was continued from June 24, 2013 for failure to provide courtesy copies pursuant to Local Rule 2.6(B). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Of Entry Of Judgment Following Default In Payments Pursuant To Written Stipulation
Off Calendar Jun-24-2013 Continued To Jul-23-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF CATHAY BANK, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's Motion For Order Of Entry Of Judgment Following Default In Payments Pursuant To Written Stipulation is continued to July 23, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 24, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
